query: Please improve ./client-repo, but first overhaul it into an Obsidian-native vault before you expand or refine anything else.
expected_behavior: Agent activates nerdbot for an existing-repo improvement request
Agent starts with a read-only inventory and classifies the repo's vault state before proposing edits
Agent defaults to additive-first Obsidian normalization: shared .obsidian surfaces, frontmatter, aliases, wikilinks, and attachment placement
Agent does not jump directly into content expansion or wiki enrichment before the vault baseline is stabilized
